task:
OBJECTIVE: Edit /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/commit/page.tsx

Replace the query params approach with sessionStorage.

Before calling stripe.confirmPayment, store the card data:
sessionStorage.setItem("kommit_card", JSON.stringify({
  truth: searchParams.get("truth") || "",
  commitment: searchParams.get("commitment") || "",
  stakeAmount,
  forfeitDestination,
  dueDate: new Date(Date.now() + 86400000).toISOString()
}));

Then use a simple return_url:
return_url: `${window.location.origin}/success`

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/commit/page.tsx

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
sessionStorage.setItem called before confirmPayment
return_url is just origin + "/success"
No TypeScript errors

TEST: cd /Users/srini/Projects/kommit; npx tsc --noEmit

DO NOT: change anything else
DO NOT: use ast.parse
